name: Solytech Enterprise Corporation
summary: Solytech Enterprise Corporation manufactures and sells switching power supplies and PC enclosures in Taiwan and internationally. It offers chassis, such as gaming, microATX, slim microATX, mini-ITX, and ATX cases chassis, as well as rackmount chassis; air purification components; and power cords and adapters for RV camp power, marine shore, and generator use. The company also provides cooling products, such as fans; and electric adjustable desk converters and gaming chairs. Solytech Enterprise Corporation was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
